title: Inbox API 2.0
agent_notes: Official Help Scout Inbox API 2.0 overview states the API is HTTPS-only, uses OAuth 2, and uses JSON for requests, responses, and error messages.

title: List Conversations
agent_notes: Official Help Scout documentation for listing and filtering conversations.

title: Get Conversation
agent_notes: Official Help Scout documentation for retrieving a conversation and optionally embedding threads.

title: Create Reply Thread
agent_notes: Official Help Scout documentation for creating a reply thread, including status and assignTo fields.

title: Update Conversation
agent_notes: Official Help Scout JSON Patch endpoint for subject, status, owner, draft, mailbox, and primary customer changes.

title: Update Tags
agent_notes: Official Help Scout endpoint for replacing the full tag list on a conversation.
